dialogos.texto_en: Oh, there's a museum shop.\nWanna take a look?
We still have time\nuntil Miku's dolphin show, right?
Yeah, we do.
I'm gonna try to find something\nthat could make a good souvenir.
I wonder if they have a life-sized stuffed toy\nof a whale shark?
Yotsuba?\nLet's not go for life-sized ones, shall we?
Well, I don't think they'll be that big.
Ah, this is cute.\nLook, Futaro, it's a bento box in the shape of a fish.
Really? That's pretty neat,\nbut I guess that's expected\nfrom a gift shop in an aquarium.
This one's a whale shark. It's a little stylized,\nbut you can still see the distinctive features.
I should've used a bento box this cute.
But if you had brought a bento box like that,\nit would have been kind of funny, don't you think?
...Is this about the time when you made me\nbento boxes every morning?
Yes.
You handed them to me at school every morning.\nIt made me happy, but wasn't it hard making 'em everyday?
No, it was really fun.\nI never thought it was hard at all.
I mean... I've always wanted to make one\nfor you, Futaro, since we started dating.
R-really...
I still remember what was in the first bento you\nmade for me, you know? It was orthodox, with an\nomelette, teriyaki chicken, and braised burdock root...
You remember well.
Of course.\n...Well it was quite obvious how much effort you put into it for me.
...Yeah.
B-but, looking back on it now,\nthe ingredients you used were all brown!\nI would give it a poor rating for the color scheme!
You don't have to remember all that.
I was just doing my best to make it,\nso I didn't have time to think about colors.
Yet, I was still surprised to see how much you had improved\nevery time you made them for me.
I practiced a lot because I wanted you\nto eat my delicious bento, Futaro.
And, I also enjoyed it more and more\nas I realized that I was getting better at it.
Me too.\nI felt like I watching over your progress.
I'm still improving, though.
Yeah. I'm looking forward\nto seeing how much you'll improve at the culinary school.
However, I was teased pretty bad by our classmates\nbecause of the bento incident.
That's right. Everyone found out\nthat we were dating because of it.
That was really embarrassing.\nThey were making fun of me when I felt the most vulnerable.
Futaro, you always gets worked up so quickly.\nIt makes you an easy target for teasing.
B-but even so.\nIt's weird to just ignore them.
...Though I have to admit, I was kind of happy.
I wonder when I'll be able to make another bento\nfor you, Futaro.
I don't know...when that will be, though...
Well, there were benefits, too.\nWe were able to let everyone know.
Benefits?
Oh, well, umm...\nIf another guy suddenly confessed to you, Miku,\nit would be a problem, right?
Letting them know...\nThat, I'm, um, your... Is what you mean?
...Or that, I'm yours?
O-okay...
I wonder when I'll be able to make another bento\nfor you, Futaro.
I don't know...when that will be, though...
Because of you, it became more colorful.
Colorful? You're not talking about the...bento, right?
The colorful high school life.\nThanks to that,\nthere are people I talk to a lot more now.
If you look at it that way, it's not a bad thing.
...I see.\nEnjoying your youth, huh?
W-well, yeah, that's one way to put it.
I was able to experience this\nbecause I was together with you, Miku. Thanks.
No...\nI've been able to experience so much\nbecause I'm with you, Futaro.
Thank you.
I wonder when I'll be able to make another bento\nfor you, Futaro.
I don't know...when that will be, though...
But, in the future...
I'll make them for you every day again.\nDelicious bento.
(In other words...)
Yeah, I'll be looking forward to it.
I'll do my best.
W-well, it's about time!\nThe dolphin show is starting,\nso let's go!
Yeah...
